notes: Production-grade connect lifecycle. Fixes: (1) profile switching dead while connecting — now uses generation-tagged tasks so newer attempts cleanly supersede older ones; (2) connections to kubectl port-forwarded Redis hanging silently — auto-normalize 'localhost' to '127.0.0.1' to dodge NWConnection's IPv6-first Happy Eyeballs that hangs on the kubectl IPv4-only bind; (3) inscrutable connection errors — NWError now maps to actionable messages ('connection refused at 127.0.0.1:10000 — is Redis listening?', 'TLS handshake failed — uncheck TLS if Redis isn't rediss://', etc.); (4) 75s OS timeout replaced with 10s hard cap; (5) Cancel button + Switch profile menu now visible mid-connect.
